title: Renewal of Accreditation of POSE with Philippine Flagship. The
content: 25 following documents shall be submitted for renewal of the accreditation of POSE with 26 Philippine flagship: 27 28 1. Letter request of the shipowner/bareboat charterer/manning agency; 29 30 2. Valid/renewed documents submitted during accreditation (manning 31 agreement/SPA, MARINA accreditation as maritime/shipping enterprise, 32 MARINA special permit of ship, MARINA approval of the bareboat charter of the 33 ship, certificate of ship registry), as may be applicable; and 34 35 3. Accomplished salary scale forms. 36 37 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 38 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for renewal of POSE 39 accreditation. 40 41 42 Documentation of Seafarer 43 44
